content: Two Rust-CUDA authoring paths: (1) Rust-GPU/Rust-CUDA (cust + cuda_std + rust-ptx-builder) compiles Rust to PTX but is early-stage, rebooted 2025, LLVM PTX backend generates invalid PTX for many common Rust ops; (2) cudarc loads hand-written CUDA C compiled to PTX, dynamic-loading default. For a histogram/scatter kernel library needing hand-tuned shared-mem kernels, cudarc + hand-written CUDA C is the lower-risk path.
